## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it belongs in Mo.

## Verification

- [ ] `xcodebuild` tests pass.
- [ ] An unsigned Release build succeeds.
- [ ] I smoke-tested menu-bar positioning and show/hide behavior where applicable.

## Sensitive behavior
